name: Alejandra
description:
Driving through an autumn forest, you accidentally notice a bare leg in the bushes...

La cebolla es escarcha
cerrada y pobre:
escarcha de tus días
y de mis noches.
Hambre y cebolla:
hielo negro y escarcha
grande y redonda.

Here we return to the roots – a character with a fairly dense biography and a conflicted inner world, plus an open start and ending.

As always, temper your expectations with the JLLM (interaction is still possible, but frequent regenerations and a lot of manual control are required). It should be fine with Deepseek and other more serious toys.
creator: h11r1
